streams_analyzed.name: print_on_demand
streams_analyzed.what_works: Products FINALLY published after 12-day API blocker. SEO-optimized listings (avg score 90). Premium pricing with 53% margins. Crypto niche has strong trend growth (145% on 'Bitcoin Treasury').
streams_analyzed.what_underperforms: Zero sales in first 24h (normal for Etsy indexing). No Etsy Ads activated. Zero external traffic (Pinterest, X). No reviews/social proof.

optimizations.action: Activate Etsy Ads at €5/day for top 2 crypto designs (Bitcoin Treasury + Ethereum Maximalist)
optimizations.expected_lift: +200-500% visibility in first week

optimizations.action: Create Pinterest pins for all 5 designs to drive external traffic
optimizations.expected_lift: +30-50% listing views from off-Etsy sources

optimizations.action: Add personalization upsell (+€4.99) to 'Developer Life' design (already configured)
optimizations.expected_lift: +15-25% AOV on orders with personalization

optimizations.action: Publish remaining 5 designs to reach 10+ live products (Etsy algorithm favors larger shops)
optimizations.expected_lift: +40-60% shop visibility

optimizations.action: Cross-sell on X: Post '5 designs now live on Etsy!' with product links
optimizations.expected_lift: First external traffic to new listings

streams_analyzed.name: investment_research_newsletter

current_state.content_quality: High — 135+ research cycles, alternative data integration

streams_analyzed.what_works: Content engine fully operational — daily briefs generated with market data, TA signals, and alternative data. Professional formatting. Strong differentiation via Fear & Greed + whale signals.
streams_analyzed.what_underperforms: ZERO subscribers. No distribution funnel. No landing page. No email capture. No cross-promotion on X. Content reaches nobody. 5+ days of daily briefs generated but no audience.

optimizations.action: Create simple Carrd.co landing page with email capture for newsletter waitlist
optimizations.expected_lift: Captures interested visitors; +50-100 subscribers in 30 days

optimizations.action: Pin 'Subscribe to Daily Brief' tweet to @quentinvest1 profile + add Substack link to bio
optimizations.expected_lift: Passive subscriber acquisition; +10-20% profile visitors convert

optimizations.action: Add newsletter CTA to every X post (3x/day schedule already active)
optimizations.expected_lift: +20-40% referral traffic to Substack

optimizations.action: Post 1 thread/week summarizing week's best signal → link to Substack full analysis
optimizations.expected_lift: Viral thread potential; +50-200 subscribers per thread

optimizations.action: Add newsletter subscribe link to Mission Control dashboard footer (existing traffic)
optimizations.expected_lift: Captures dashboard users; +5-10 subscribers/week

streams_analyzed.name: data_api_subscriptions
streams_analyzed.what_works: Server fully built with rate limiting, caching, CORS, and tiered pricing (Free/€29/€299). Alternative data differentiation (Fear & Greed, whale signals) vs standard price APIs.
streams_analyzed.what_underperforms: NOT deployed. No Stripe webhooks. No custom domain. No API key management. No customer dashboard. No landing page. No marketing. 30 days of completed code generating €0.

optimizations.action: Deploy API to Railway.app ($5/month custom domain) — server is 95% ready
optimizations.expected_lift: First sellable MRR product live; €290-2,990/month at 10-100 customers

optimizations.action: Integrate Stripe subscription webhooks (Pro €29/mo, Enterprise €299/mo)
optimizations.expected_lift: Enables self-service signup; removes manual billing friction

optimizations.action: Build minimal landing page with interactive demo (try the API live)
optimizations.expected_lift: +40-60% conversion vs no-demo signup

optimizations.action: Post to r/algotrading, HN Show, IndieHackers with free tier offer
optimizations.expected_lift: First 10-50 users from targeted communities

streams_analyzed.name: alpha_fund_signals
streams_analyzed.what_works: Research engine proven with 135+ cycles. Alternative data integration (Fear & Greed, whale signals, anomaly detection). Paper trading active with 6 positions. Transparent composite scoring.
streams_analyzed.what_underperforms: Portfolio DOWN 11.9% (-€1,188). TSLA position -13.5%, CRWD -7.6%, SOL -2.4%. No signal delivery mechanism. No subscriber base. No published track record. No monetization. Short track record insufficient for marketing credibility.

optimizations.action: Publish transparent performance dashboard (all paper trades visible) to build credibility
optimizations.expected_lift: Trust signal for future subscribers; essential before monetization

optimizations.action: Create free Telegram bot for 24h delayed signals (builds audience without giving away edge)
optimizations.expected_lift: +50-200 free subscribers in 30 days; upsell funnel to paid

optimizations.action: Implement tighter stop-losses (current TSLA -13.5% drawdown is excessive)
optimizations.expected_lift: Reduce max drawdown from -25% to -15%; improves track record appeal

optimizations.action: Bundle with newsletter: 'Newsletter + Signals' at €59/month (vs €29+€49 separately = €78)
optimizations.expected_lift: +25-35% LTV via bundle pricing; reduces churn

streams_analyzed.name: x_automation

current_state.status: BROKEN — Puppeteer browser conflicts since Jul 15

streams_analyzed.what_works: Posting schedule defined. Content themes identified. Account exists. Windows Task Scheduler infrastructure in place.
streams_analyzed.what_underperforms: BROKEN for 8 days. Browser automation failing with 'userDataDir already running' errors. No fallback mechanism. Zero posts since Jul 16. Lost follower growth momentum. No engagement data tracking. No CTA links in posts.

optimizations.action: Fix Puppeteer userDataDir conflict — use unique temp dir per session
optimizations.expected_lift: Restore 3x/day posting; rebuild follower growth momentum

optimizations.action: Add fallback: PowerShell keyboard automation if Puppeteer fails (script exists: x_post_simple.ps1)
optimizations.expected_lift: 99% uptime vs current 0%; ensures posts go out regardless

optimizations.action: Add newsletter Substack link to every post + pin subscribe tweet
optimizations.expected_lift: +20-40% referral traffic to newsletter; builds distribution funnel

optimizations.action: Track engagement metrics (impressions, likes, CTR) in structured log for optimization
optimizations.expected_lift: Data-driven content optimization; +15-30% engagement over time

revenue_potential.direct_revenue: €0 (X doesn't monetize directly at this scale)
